business.name: Cole Fence LLC
business.tagline: Wood, vinyl, chain link, and farm fencing built to last in the Upstate.

payments.notes: Client-owned Stripe Payment Links ONLY (https://buy.stripe.com/...). Card data flows to Stripe, never to this site or the agency. Empty tokens are stripped in client builds and forced to '#' in demo builds. See docs/STRIPE_SETUP.md.

meta.notes: All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties.
